items.title: Revenge of the Baskerville Bloodhound
items.description:
Raised to kill like a pack of loyal hounds, the Baskerville children took countless lives as a band of fearsome assassins. Despite being the shunned illegitimate son of the brood, Vikir served his family faithfully, only to meet his untimely demise at his father’s hands. But when he is inexplicably reborn with a second chance at life, Vikir, armed with the memories and knowledge of his past, swears to rise above the pack and take his revenge. This time, he's ready to bite the hand that feeds.

(Source: Tapas)

items.title: The Reborn Young Lord is an Assassin
items.description:
Cyan Vert, illegitimate son of the Duke and the empire's greatest assassin, is betrayed by the righteous brother whose shadow he's always lived in. But just before the fatal blow strikes his throat, Cyan awakes to find he's just a boy again. The young lord has been reborn, and this time, he's not going to live in anyone's shadow!

(Source: WEBTOON)

items.title: The Tutorial Is Too Tough!
items.description:
Lee Ho-Jae had given up his life as a pro gamer, until one day he received a mysterious message:

“Congratulations! You’ve been invited to the Tutorial World.”

Intrigued, he enters the game and confidently chooses “hell” difficulty, but soon learns that he is trapped there. With a mere 0.01% survival rate, Ho-Jae must somehow overcome the game’s agonizing challenges to figure out the real reason he was invited. This tutorial may be tough, but its secrets are what’s truly hellacious.

(Source: Tapas, edited)

items.title: The Dragon Slayer's Regression on Another Level
items.description:
Zeke Draker was the first of House Draker to fail his Awakening. And for that, he was cast out. Forced to survive in a brutal world, Zeke rose from disgrace and earned the name Phantom of the North. On a mission to stop the emperor from obtaining an ancient relic, Zeke was hunted and killed by imperial forces. But fate had other plans. Zeke awakens as a 12-year-old boy back in the Cradle, House Draker’s elite training ground. Given a second chance, Zeke’s determined to rewrite his fate.

(Source: Tapas)

items.title: The Sword-Eating Swordmaster
items.description:
Only a swordmaster can slay another. Arhan believed the tales of Liam Karavan, the founding father of his house, were nothing more than legend, until a deadly swordmaster slaughtered everyone dear to him. In his darkest hour, Liam comes to him as a guiding spirit, revealing the true power of their bloodline--the power to devour blades and inherit the strength and memories held within. With each sword consumed, Arhan draws one step closer to vengeance. To avenge his loved ones and restore House Karavan to its former glory, he must survive the perilous path to becoming a swordmaster.

(Source: WEBTOON)
